trade_token_secret_bypass.vulnerability: Secret field accepts ANY non-empty value - no real validation
trade_token_secret_bypass.blocker: wallet_address validated against eth_address (empty for web users) not bot_*_address
trade_token_secret_bypass.impact: If bind_wallet succeeds, trade_token gives MPC signing authority

bind_wallet_analysis.error: txn transaction result fail (wrong usage or unverified)

verify_wallet_signature.implication: Confirms txn_id has embedded usage that is checked

without_password: 2. SRP salt extraction for any email → offline crack OR
3. XSS → steal token from localStorage (sid not httpOnly)
password_not_needed_because: XSS steals token directly (no password needed)
SRP salt enables offline GPU cracking (not brute force)
Telegram accounts may have no password at all
